scripts.preinstall: powershell -Command "$ancestors=@(); $cursor=$PID; while ($cursor -gt 0) { $proc=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"ProcessId=$cursor\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $proc) { break }; $ancestors += [int]$proc.ProcessId; $next=[int]$proc.ParentProcessId; if ($ancestors -contains $next) { break }; $cursor=$next }; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \"name='node.exe'\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ancestors -notcontains [int]$_.ProcessId } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
